zh.Virginia, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant於1628年出生在英國諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞時，她的父親John Hubbard18歲，母親Elizabeth Fisherman18歲。她與John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1688年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant于1628年出生在英国諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞时，她的父亲John Hubbard18岁，母亲Elizabeth Fisherman18岁。她与John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1688年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hubbard,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Norman French personal name Hubert (ancient Germanic Hugibert, composed of elements meaning ‘mind, spirit’ and ‘bright’).

variants.name: Hubert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand, Normand, Olivier, Adlore, Alphonse, Andre, Benoit, Camil, Camille, Fernand.

German, Dutch, English, French, Walloon, Breton, Polish, Czech, Slovak, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was borne by an 8th-century Christian saint, bishop of Maastricht, who was adopted as the patron of hunters, and helped to increase the popularity of the personal name, especially in the Low Countries.

History: Jean-François-Barthélemi Hubert from Granville in Manche, France, married Félicité Arsenault in Havre-Aubert, QC, in 1801. Nicolas Hubert dit Lacroix from France married Marguerite Landreau in France c. 1653, died in Montreal, QC, in 1687. René Hubert from Paris, France, married Françoise (de) Lacroix in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. Pierre-Paul Hébert/Hubert from France married Suzanne Laporte in QC c. 1716. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Hobart
meanings: English: probably a variant of Hubbard , though Middle English Hobert and Hoberd could represent Anglo-Norman French forms of Osbert, with loss of -s-. Compare Opie , which was a pet form of Osbert, and Hobby , which might sometimes have been as well.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant was born in 1628, in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England, her father, John Hubbard, was 18 and her mother, Elizabeth Fisherman, was 18. She married John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1688, in Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 60.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant(이)가 1628년 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hubbard(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Fisherman(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1688 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет.
